SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.ai

Interface EntityAI

All Superinterfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
All Known Implementing Classes:
HostileAI
public interface EntityAI extends org.bukkit.event.Listener
Interface for AI-controlled entities in the game.

Provides default event handlers and behavior methods for AI actions such as targeting, attacking, rotation, and cooldown management.

Implementing classes must provide the entity instance and relevant stats like range and cooldowns.

    Attacks the current target if within range and cooldown allows.

    Override to handle AI-specific spawn logic.

    Called every tick.
    default void
    resetCooldown()
    Resets the AI's attack cooldown to the entity's default value.
    default void
    rotateTowardsTarget()
    Rotates the AI entity to face its current target.
    void
    setCooldownRemaining(float cooldown)
    Sets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack.
    default void
    tickHandler()
    Starts a repeating task that ticks the AI logic every server tick.

  • Method Details

    • getEntity

      DumbEntity getEntity()
      Returns the custom entity associated with this AI.
      Returns:
      the DumbEntity instance representing this AI-controlled entity

    • getInstance

      org.bukkit.entity.LivingEntity getInstance()
      Returns the Bukkit LivingEntity instance for this AI.
      Returns:
      the Bukkit entity instance

    • getRange

      Double getRange()
      Returns the AI's detection/interaction range.
      Returns:
      the range in blocks

    • getCooldownRemaining

      float getCooldownRemaining()
      Returns the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack again.
      Returns:
      remaining cooldown in ticks

    • setCooldownRemaining

      void setCooldownRemaining(float cooldown)
      Sets the remaining cooldown before the AI can attack.
      Parameters:
      cooldown - cooldown duration in ticks

    • tickHandler

      default void tickHandler()
      Starts a repeating task that ticks the AI logic every server tick.

    • onTick

      default void onTick()
      Called every tick. Override to implement custom per-tick AI behavior.

    • isTargetEntity

      default boolean isTargetEntity(org.bukkit.entity.Entity entity)
      Checks if the given entity is controlled by this AI.
      Parameters:
      entity - entity to check
      Returns:
      true if this AI controls the entity

    • onEntitySpawn

      default void onEntitySpawn(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntitySpawnEvent event)
      Called when an entity spawns. Filters only the AI's entity.
      Parameters:
      event - spawn event

    • onSpawn

      default void onSpawn(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntitySpawnEvent event)
      Override to handle AI-specific spawn logic.
      Parameters:
      event - spawn event

    • onEntityHurt

      default void onEntityHurt(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Called when the AI entity takes damage.
      Parameters:
      event - damage event

    • onHurt

      default void onHurt(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Override to handle AI-specific hurt logic.
      Parameters:
      event - damage event

    • onEntityHit

      default void onEntityHit(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Called when the AI entity deals damage to another entity.
      Parameters:
      event - damage event

    • onHit

      default void onHit(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Override to handle AI-specific hit logic.
      Parameters:
      event - damage event

    • onEntityDeath

      default void onEntityDeath(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDeathEvent event)
      Called when the AI entity dies.
      Parameters:
      event - death event

    • onDeath

      default void onDeath(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDeathEvent event)
      Override to handle AI-specific death logic.
      Parameters:
      event - death event

    • rotateTowardsTarget

      default void rotateTowardsTarget()
      Rotates the AI entity to face its current target.

      Calculates yaw (horizontal rotation) and pitch (vertical rotation) based on vector from AI to target.

    • checkForTargets

      default void checkForTargets()
      Searches for nearby players to set as a target for the AI.

      Prioritizes players over other entities and ensures only one target at a time.

    • attackTarget

      default void attackTarget()
      Attacks the current target if within range and cooldown allows.

      Handles damage, cooldown reset, and animation (swing hand).

    • resetCooldown

      default void resetCooldown()
      Resets the AI's attack cooldown to the entity's default value.
